title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Reliance Industries - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Reliance Industries - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Reliance Industries:
Reliance Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries!
